creator: yasu_ocochi@rock.odn.ne.jp
text:
Acer 1410 laptop PC. Celeron SU2300 CPU + Mobile Intel GS45 chipset +
Insyde H20 ver. 0.3303 firmware. 

I tried to install to either USB2.0-memory or USB2.0-harddrive, both were
detected as 'da0'.

Booting from DVD, sysinstall -> Standard or Custom -> Partition -> Label
-> Distribution -> Media done with no problem.

Immediately after "Commit", occurs "panic: page fault cpuid 1 xxxx"
(xxxx : sorry, but I missed.).  Continues writing to disk.  To abort, I
had to press the power button.
